_comment: EDIT ME — periods are placeholders. Add `_id` fields for Indonesian (e.g. summary_id, role_id, org_id, description_id); the site falls back to English when an `_id` field is missing. Set resumeUrl to a PDF path in /public to show the Download-CV-as-file link.
summary: Full Stack Developer & Software Engineer with {years}+ years of experience building web apps, developer tools, and interactive experiences. Specialized in Vue.js, Nuxt, Laravel, and Node.js — from enterprise client platforms to independent products.
summary_id: Full Stack Developer & Software Engineer dengan {years}+ tahun pengalaman membangun aplikasi web, developer tools, dan pengalaman interaktif. Spesialis Vue.js, Nuxt, Laravel, dan Node.js — dari platform klien enterprise sampai produk independen.

timeline.description: Designing and shipping my own products, developer tools, and interactive web apps — including Dibiku (database client), Neatly (code formatter), and a range of educational and browser experiences.
timeline.description_id: Merancang dan merilis produk, developer tools, dan aplikasi web interaktif sendiri — termasuk Dibiku (database client), Neatly (code formatter), serta beragam pengalaman edukatif dan browser.

timeline.description: Delivered enterprise and client platforms with Vue.js, Laravel, and Node.js — including Honda Indonesia, BPOM, real-time systems (MyMeet), and e-learning (Dapur Ilmu). API integration, real-time features, and VPS deployment.
timeline.description_id: Mengerjakan platform enterprise dan klien dengan Vue.js, Laravel, dan Node.js — termasuk Honda Indonesia, BPOM, sistem real-time (MyMeet), dan e-learning (Dapur Ilmu). Integrasi API, fitur real-time, dan deployment VPS.

timeline.description: Early full-stack work: UI-to-HTML slicing, SPA development, third-party API integration, and server setup on Digital Ocean with Nginx and Redis.
timeline.description_id: Pekerjaan full-stack awal: slicing UI-ke-HTML, pengembangan SPA, integrasi API pihak ketiga, dan setup server di Digital Ocean dengan Nginx dan Redis.
